---
title: "citation"
author: "Carilli"
date: "12/30/2020"
output: html_document
bibliography: covid-references.bib
nocite: |
  @wong_social_2020
  @noauthor_social_nodate

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(bibtex)
```

let's cite the article Oxford University’s COVID-19 Government Response Tracker (OxCGRT) [@hale_oxford_2020]

abc def

# References
